_comment: Hand-curated overlay on top of methods.json. Captures PrismHR quirks, param enums, rate-limit flags, and status-gated preconditions learned from live UAT probing. Merged into the catalog at load time and surfaced via meta_describe.

payroll.v1.getApprovalSummary.GET: Only callable on batches in INIT status. Returns HTTP 400 on READY, POSTCOMP, or COMPLETE.
payroll.v1.getBatchStatus.GET: batchIds is a comma-separated list, not a JSON array. Example: '20191,20192,20193'.
payroll.v1.getBatchListByDate.GET: dateType must be exactly PAY, PERIOD, or POST. Any other value returns 400.
payroll.v1.payGroupScheduleReport.GET: Aggressively rate-limited by PrismHR. Expect 429 under repeated calls.
generalLedger.v1.getClientGLData.GET: Rate-limited under concurrent load. Back off on 429.
payroll.v1.getBulkYearToDateValues.GET: Async download endpoint. First call returns buildStatus=INIT with a downloadId. Poll same endpoint with that downloadId until buildStatus=DONE, then fetch dataObject URL. On the first poll, status may already be DONE — handle immediately, do not sleep.
clientMaster.v1.getBenefitWorkflowGrid.G: Async download; same INIT -> BUILD -> DONE pattern as getBulkYearToDateValues.
benefits.v1.retirementCensusExport.GET: Async download; same INIT -> BUILD -> DONE pattern. reportFormat is required but undocumented enum — only 'Census', 'Participants', 'Eligibility' are accepted.
login.v1.requestAPIPermissions.POST: Body must wrap requested permissions in a `newPermissions` field; undocumented. This endpoint is admin-only and NEVER exposed through meta_call.

planType.note: Single-letter codes only. HSA / FSA / 125 are rejected with 400.

docTypes.note: Use a specific doc-type code. 'ALL' returns 500.

service_name_traps.CodeFilesService: Wrong. Use CodeFileService (singular). Grants filed under the plural name accept but never match the ACL — silent 403 forever.
